name: Conexant Systems, Inc.
description: Conexant Systems, Inc. was an American software developer and fabless semiconductor company that specialized in silicon and software solutions for voice and audio processing, imaging, and modems. Originally spun off from Rockwell International in 1999, the company developed technologies for smart homes, personal computers, tablets, and various consumer electronics. Conexant was acquired by Synaptics Incorporated in July 2017.
